summary: Completed frontend testing of AI Chat UX fixes in AIAssistant.js. All 7 features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: AI Chat opens without errors - Chat window opens when clicking AI Assistant button
User can login and interact with the chat - Login with test@example.com works, chat is interactive
Scroll stays at bottom during AI response - isAtBottom: true throughout conversation (scroll-to-top bug FIXED)
AI responses appear as chunked messages - Found 10 chunked AI messages for long response
No markdown symbols visible in AI responses - All messages clean text (no **, ##, *, -, etc.)
Chat input is disabled while AI is responding - Input disabled during loading/chunking state
Suggestion chips work correctly - All 6 chips visible (Vegan, Gluten-free, Under €20, Spanish origin, High protein, No nuts)
Suggestion chip click triggers AI response - Clicking Vegan chip sends query and receives response
Product recommendations panel appears with relevant products - 6 productos shown after AI response
critical_code_review_comments: stripMarkdown() function is comprehensive - handles headers, bold/italic, code blocks, links, bullet points, numbered lists
chunkMessage() splits at ~150 chars per chunk for natural conversation feel
shouldAutoScroll ref properly tracks user scroll position to prevent scroll-to-top bug
handleScroll() correctly detects when user scrolls up (threshold: 50px from bottom)
isChunking state properly disables input during chunked message delivery
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user account
context_for_next_testing_agent: AI Chat UX fixes in AIAssistant.js fully tested and working. Key fixes: 1) Removed broken scrollToStart() that caused scroll-to-top bug. 2) Added shouldAutoScroll ref to track user scroll position. 3) chunkMessage() splits long AI responses into 1-3 sentence chunks with 400ms delays. 4) stripMarkdown() removes all markdown formatting. 5) handleScroll() detects when user scrolls up to pause auto-scroll.

scroll_behavior.details: Chat stays at bottom during AI response. scrollTop properly increases as new messages appear. isAtBottom: true throughout conversation.

message_chunking.details: Long AI responses split into multiple messages (10 chunks observed). Each chunk ~150 chars (1-3 sentences).

markdown_stripping.details: No markdown symbols (**, ##, *, -, ```) visible in any AI response. All text is clean and readable.

input_disabled_during_response.details: Chat input disabled during loading and isChunking states. Re-enabled after response completes.

suggestion_chips.details: All 6 chips visible in fresh chat. Clicking chip sends query and triggers AI response with product recommendations.
